sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20344" key="boo/stolos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βοό-στολος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n20344.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">riding on a bull</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νύμφη</foreign>, of Europa, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:66" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.66</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
